title: dianthus albens
intro: Dianthus albens, also known as Silver Pink or Mountain Pink, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, colds, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and relieving coughs. Dianthus albens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
